queue.title: Work queue
queue.batchRenderTitle: Trigger final render on all {{n}} cases in this lane (brand: {{brand}})
queue.batchUpgradeTitle: Run v3 async upgrade on all {{n}} cases in this lane (brand: {{brand}})
queue.confirmRenderOver: {{count}} exceeds batch limit {{max}}. Only enqueue first {{max}}?
queue.confirmUpgradeOver: {{count}} exceeds batch limit {{max}}. Only enqueue first {{max}}?
queue.confirmUpgrade: Trigger v3 async upgrade on {{count}} cases (brand: {{brand}})? 5–30s each, concurrency 2.
queue.forceRenderTitle: Bypass the quality gate and force-render this lane's {{n}} cases (may include false-negative or genuinely-missing-view cases)
queue.confirmForceRender:
Force batch render bypasses the quality gate and renders {{count}} cases directly (may include false-negative or genuinely-missing-view cases).

Force only bypasses the gate — it does not authorize burn (cache-miss still needs confirmation). Confirm the source images are usable. Continue?

worktray.title: Review work-tray
worktray.unreviewedSub: {{pct}}% of total · auto judgement done · waiting for human confirmation

pick.title: Batch render
pick.desc: {{count}} cases ready to render (brand: {{brand}}). Includes cases with warnings that can be force-rendered.

wait.title: Rendering in progress
wait.desc: Jobs enqueued — see progress in the bottom-right toast. Turns green when done — click "Go to review". Batch
wait.descDone: All jobs finished. Click "Go to review" to inspect results. Batch

review.title: Done — review quality
review.desc: Open the quality review page to approve or re-render results.
